_meta.note: This file drives every piece of text, stat, and image path on the site, split into one namespace per page (home, work, people, news, contact) plus shared site/nav/footer data. Edit values here — no HTML/CSS/JS knowledge required. Sample projects, stats, people, news posts, and trust.logos below are clearly-labeled illustrative placeholders. Review README.md before publishing live, and replace image paths under assets/images/ with real photography, real client/partner logos, and real team/news photos.

site.name: Dokimos Consulting Engineers
site.descriptor: Infrastructure, buildings, and project delivery for Africa's future.
site.metaDescription: Dokimos Consulting is an indigenous Ugandan multidisciplinary engineering firm delivering infrastructure, buildings and architecture, and project advisory services to improve quality of life across Africa.

slides.imageAlt: Water, road, and energy infrastructure at golden hour
slides.headline: Infrastructure Engineered to Outlast.
slides.subheadline: Water, transportation, and energy systems designed for growing demand and Africa's toughest conditions.

slides.headline: Structures Proven Before They're Built.
slides.subheadline: Architectural and structural engineering for facilities held to the same standard as the infrastructure around them.

slides.headline: From Concept to Commissioning.
slides.subheadline: Project planning and full project delivery oversight so designs survive contact with procurement and the construction site.

about.heading: Proven, by definition.
about.lead: We are an indigenous Ugandan engineering consultancy built on a simple conviction: Africa's infrastructure problems deserve African-led solutions.
about.body: We work across three integrated practice areas — infrastructure, buildings and architecture, and project advisory and delivery — spanning water, transportation, and energy engineering through to architectural design and full project management.

values.title: Proven, Not Promised
values.description: Every design is stress-tested against real site data, real climate projections, and real budgets before it reaches a client's desk.

values.title: Local-First Engineering
values.description: We design for the materials, labor markets, and maintenance realities of the communities we serve — not the conditions of a foreign template.

values.title: Built for Climate Reality
values.description: Resilience isn't an add-on line item. Flood, drought, and heat projections are built into every water, road, and power design from day one.

values.title: Integrity in Every Line Item
values.description: Transparent costing, honest timelines, and engineering sign-off we're willing to put our name on.

services.heading: Three practices. One standard.
services.intro: Infrastructure, buildings, and delivery aren't separate problems in the communities we serve — they're one connected practice. We design and deliver across all three, held to the same standard of proof.

pillars.name: Infrastructure Engineering
pillars.summary: Water, transportation, and energy systems engineered for growing demand and unpredictable climate.

pillars.name: Buildings & Structures
pillars.summary: Architectural and structural engineering for facilities that have to perform as hard as the infrastructure around them.

pillars.name: Advisory & Delivery
pillars.summary: Planning and delivery discipline that gets a design from concept to a functioning system on the ground.

approach.heading: From assessment to a system that sustains itself.
approach.intro: Infrastructure fails when it's designed for a site visit instead of a lifetime. Our process is built to prevent that.

steps.title: Assess
steps.description: Site, hydrology, soil, community need, and climate projections — gathered and verified before a single line is drawn.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Engineering grounded in local materials, local labor capacity, and realistic long-term maintenance budgets.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.description: Rigorous technical oversight through procurement, construction, and commissioning.

steps.title: Sustain
steps.description: Monitoring plans, maintenance training, and capacity handover so the system outlives the contract.

featuredWork.heading: Selected Concepts
featuredWork.intro: A sample of the sector and scale of work we take on.

trust.heading: Trusted by the people building Africa's infrastructure.
trust.intro: Government agencies, development partners, and private clients we deliver engineering work for. Logos below are placeholders — see README.md before publishing live.

work.heading: Selected Concepts
work.intro: A sample of the sector and scale of work we take on. Entries marked Concept are illustrative studies used to demonstrate our design approach.

items.title: Kyoga Basin Water Treatment Works
items.description: A regional treatment and distribution concept sized to serve growing lakeside communities with climate-resilient intake design.

items.title: Rwizi Valley Irrigation Scheme
items.description: Gravity-fed irrigation network concept designed to extend growing seasons for smallholder farmland along the Rwizi Valley.

items.title: Nile Corridor Feeder Road Upgrade
items.description: All-weather feeder road and drainage concept connecting agricultural communities to regional trade routes.

items.title: Kampala Bypass Drainage Resilience Retrofit
items.description: A flood-mitigation retrofit concept for urban road corridors prone to seasonal flash flooding.

items.title: Karamoja Solar Mini-Grid Network
items.description: A distributed mini-grid concept bringing reliable power to communities beyond the national grid's economic reach.

items.title: Semliki Run-of-River Hydropower Study
items.description: A low-impact, run-of-river hydropower feasibility concept designed to minimize ecological disruption while serving the regional grid.

people.heading: The engineers behind the proof.
people.intro: Dokimos is built and staffed by Ugandan engineers. This page is a placeholder roster — swap in real names, photos, and bios whenever your team is ready.

contact.heading: Let's engineer something proven.
contact.intro: Whether it's a feasibility study or a full design brief, tell us where you're starting from.
